form.formComment: Returns from a 40-day let-up. Most recently held ground to the line 3rd of 9 at Sandown-Hillside 3yo Bm64 on February 25 over 1500m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Bel Mezyaan with 57.5kg at $4. Before that 2nd in a small field at Sandown-Hillside F&M Bm70 on February 4 over 1400m, 1.3 len behind Butternut Princess carrying 55kg at $4.40. This looks a stern test.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of four-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign won by 2 len Geelong 3yo F Mdn-Sw November 26 over 1414m defeating Silent Answer carrying 57kg at $2.70. Previously first up; third of 8 at Ballarat 3yo Mdn-Sw October 24 over 1200m, soft track; 9 len behind Chergui with 56kg at $3.70. Wouldn't surprise if she picked up where she left off.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. When well in the market at debut, sat on the pace when 3rd of 9 at Kyneton 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1206m, 3 len behind Milos Filos carrying 57kg at $4.40. Second-up won by 2.25 len at Sale Mdn-Sw March 29 over 1100m on a soft track defeating Royal Honour carrying 57kg at $3.80. Have to respect again with Lane booked from a good draw.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 1.3 len at Geelong Mdn-Sw March 14 over 1312m defeating Brightly Dance carrying 55kg at $1.60. The race before that made ground from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Cranbourne Mdn-Sw on February 27 over 1200m, head behind Juvenal carrying 57kg at $6.50. Can measure up again.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start 5th of 11 at Geelong 2yo Mdn-Sw on June 20 over 1212m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Lope De Lardo carrying 56kg at $16.
